data.title: Ye Bu Shou
data.synopsis:
2283, in a post-nuclear wasteland, Fortress City 021 was controlled by Ark Corporation. Their so-called "Savior Guardians" appeared to protect humanity but secretly conducted human experiments using X chips and manipulated public opinion. Young Han Che witnessed his brother's murder by the false Guardians and unexpectedly awakened the "1307 Source System" within him, gaining superpowers. He joined the Yebushou organization, rebuilt by Guan Shanhu, and fought alongside hacker Tian Xin and engineer Kang Di. Yebushou infiltrated Ark training camps and Ghost Island Prison, exposing a plot to create a superpowered army using experiments and mutants. As Han Che unlocked new abilities and faced formidable enemies like Emperor Angel and Divine-Eye Immortal, he embarked on a path of vengeance, truth, and salvation. However, the hidden AI "Lefu" was plotting to control all human consciousness.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Shi Ren Huixiang
data.synopsis:
Lu Xiaobai, an ordinary high schooler, is suddenly attacked by "Xiao", a higher-dimensional envoy. On the brink of death, he awakens time-based powers and is rescued by his future self, "Cang". Taking up his late father's mission, Lu Xiaobai takes over the leadership of the Bureau of Demon Defense, an organization dedicated to defending humanity. Together with Cang and new allies, he confronts a series of crises sparked by villains, ultimately drawing out and defeating them, reshaping the timeline, and saving humanity from a doomed future.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Bai Gui Ri Xing
data.synopsis:
A parasitized boy killed his cruel master and became the strongest supernatural hunter. Using his bizarre form, he hunted the mysterious, ultimately transforming into a "Mad Killing God," saving humanity at the cost of everything he cherished.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Tian Guan Xueyuan
data.synopsis:
To resist invasions from other worlds, the Heavenly Great Sage founded Tianguan Academy. Every year, the Academy would recruit new students—but in the end, only nine could become the official Heavenly Officers. Gu Tian, a young soccer player, accidentally awakened his hidden power while saving someone on the field. Invited by his senior Xia Zhi, he boarded Subway Line 36 to Tianguan Academy. With the world's finest teachers, strict assessments, and a brutal elimination system, the Academy pushes its students to the limit. By a stroke of fortune, Gu Tian became the 81st student to pass the entrance trial. Under the guidance of celestial masters, he studied spells and divine decrees, honed his combat skills against powerful rivals, and strode forward step by step toward the ultimate goal of becoming one of the Nines.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Yi Ci Guiling
data.synopsis:
Xu Yichuan accidentally travels into a nightmarish realm and awakens the ability to regenerate. To escape this twisted dimension and return to his family, he gathers a group of partners to brave deadly games and unlock abilities. But it turns out that all this is a death trap conspired by the realm's supreme overseer. In the end, Xu Yichuan and his companions manage to break through the overseer’s grip and keep looking for ways to escape.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Suo Yao Lu
data.synopsis:
College student Liu Ye accidentally entered a mysterious pawnshop, awakened his bloodline powers, and inherited the Mountain-Seeking Map. In rescuing a friend, he unlocked the map's mysterious spells, gradually sensing ties from his past life with Bai Ze. The unusual abilities of Liu Ye drew the attention of the Supernatural Bureau, which sent the elite Lu Li to intervene under the pretext of "supervision." At the same time, the pawnshop heiress Lin Nianyu began pursuing him to seize the map, and the three formed separate demon-sealing teams with their own agendas.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Chaoxinxing
data.synopsis:
The hero of the Star Federation, "Beidou", was framed as a traitor and imprisoned. A decade later, Yang Bei returned to clear his name, embarking on an adventure with the Federation President's daughter to find allies. Ultimately, Yang Bei exposed the conspiracy and reclaimed his status as a star hero.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Xibu de Tuke
data.synopsis:
Tuke is a spirit guardian exiled to the mortal realm. For centuries, he's protected humanity with eight other spirit guardians. But the River God's Son, who was sealed away by them, breaks free and takes control of seven spirit guardians' souls, plotting to transform the world into a purgatory. To save his friends and defeat the River God's Son, Tuke ventures all the way to the Son's stronghold, where an epic battle ensues...

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Shi Yiren
data.synopsis:
A low-level office worker accidentally consumed a demon and underwent a mutation. Struggling to survive, he hunted evil, seeking light and justice.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: High School! Kimengumi (2026)
data.synopsis:
Rei Ichidou, Gou Reietsu, Kiyoshi Shusse, Jin Daima, and Dai Monohoshi are five mischievous boys attending Ichiou Junior High. Each with an eccentric personality and a knack for chaos, they've earned a reputation as the infamous "Kimen-gumi."

One day, new transfer student Yui Kawa and her friend Chie Uru encounter the group and soon find themselves drawn into their antics. Around them are other colorful cliques—from the handsome "Iro Otoko-gumi" led by Shou Kireide, to the delinquent "Ban-gumi" led by You Nihiruda, the athletic "Ude-gumi" led by Kai Undou, and the tough girl squad "Onna-gumi" led by Jako Amano.

As time passes and a new spring begins, the everyday lives of these eccentric students unfold in a lively and comedic school story.

(Source: MAL News)
data.background: High School! Kimengumi (2026) aired on Fuji TV's noitaminA block.

titles.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam: Tekketsu no Orphans - Urdr Hunt: Chiisana Chousensha no Kiseki
機動戦士ガンダム 鉄血のオルフェンズ ウルズハント -小さな挑戦者の軌跡-
Mobile Suit Gundam: Iron-Blooded Orphans – Urdr Hunt Special Edition: Path of the Little Challenger

data.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam: Tekketsu no Orphans - Urdr Hunt: Chiisana Chousensha no Kiseki
data.title_english: Mobile Suit Gundam: Iron-Blooded Orphans – Urdr Hunt Special Edition: Path of the Little Challenger
data.title_japanese: 機動戦士ガンダム 鉄血のオルフェンズ ウルズハント -小さな挑戦者の軌跡-
data.synopsis:
Year P.D. 323. Gjallarhorn's political intervention into the Arbrau central parliament escalated into an armed conflict using mobile suits. The incident was brought to an end by Tekkadan, a group of boys who came from Mars.

News of Tekkadan's exploits has also reached the ears of Wistario Afam, a youth born and raised at the Radonitsa Colony near Venus. Venus, which lost to Mars in the contest for development, is a remote frontier planet in which the four great economic blocs show little interest. It is now used only as a penal colony for criminals, whose inhabitants don't even have IDs.

Then Wistario, who hopes to change the status quo of this homeland, encounters a girl who claims to be the guide to the Urdr-Hunt.

(Source: Gundam Global Portal)
data.background: Originally, this Urdr Hunt spin-off produced by Sunrise Beyond streamed within the Kidou Senshi Gundam: Tekketsu no Orphans G smartphone game app in 12 episodes from November 2022 to October 2023.

Set to Digimon Story Time Stranger's theme song "wherever you are", the Prelude short focuses on Inori and her younger brother just before the main story's events.

(Source: Youtube)

titles.title: Koutetsu no Rinna wa XX Saretai
一式さんは恋を知りたい。

data.title: Isshiki-san wa Koi wo Shiritai.
data.title_japanese: 一式さんは恋を知りたい。
title_synonyms: Koutetsu no Rinna wa XX Saretai
data.synopsis:
A maiden who doesn't know what love is tries her hand at dating as a pseudo-couple!

Inspector Rinna, who is respected by everyone as a hard-working and serious policewoman, seems to be having trouble with her work lately. The reason for this is because she loses focus. It only happens when Meishi, the detective she works with, is around... So, she makes a choice...?

(Source: Kadokawa, translated)

data.title: Kasukana Yuuhi
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Kasukana Yuuhi by Magical Girl holoWitches!.

(Source: Yamamura Animation)

titles.title: Saikyou no Shokugyou wa Yuusha demo Kenja demo Naku Kanteishi (Kari) Rashii desu yo?
最強の職業は勇者でも賢者でもなく鑑定士（仮）らしいですよ？
The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!

data.title: Saikyou no Shokugyou wa Yuusha demo Kenja demo Naku Kanteishi (Kari) Rashii desu yo?
data.title_english: The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!
data.title_japanese: 最強の職業は勇者でも賢者でもなく鑑定士（仮）らしいですよ？
data.synopsis:
Hibiki, a high school student who was suddenly transferred to another world, wanders alone in a vast grassland of a fantasy world where monsters inhabit. All he has are non-combat skills such as "Appraisal"! From a hopeless situation, he is saved by encounters, and his all-powerful abilities blossom! An another world adventure tale of miraculous reversal cheats burst forth!

(Source: AlphaPolis)
data.background: Each episode was streamed four days in advance of the TV broadcast starting on March 31, 2026, on Crunchyroll. Regular broadcasting began on April 4, 2026.
